T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
41 
NRSNG_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 
LABEL: 
Nursing Services Provider Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 
DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the nursing service provider category; ever 
in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: NRSNG_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 
LONG NAME: NRSNG_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR base
